title: Two Men in Love
meaning_summary: Two Men in Love has smaller scale than In This Shirt, but its emotional directness gives it durable niche streaming and sync-style value.
revenue_drivers: Loyal niche listeners keep the song active beyond release-era attention.
Its emotional framing makes it suitable for mood-driven discovery.
Catalog listening around In This Shirt creates spillover value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from niche streaming depth, catalog replay value, and selective licensing, using creator-leaning rights splits.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between artist-affiliated control and distribution-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears concentrated on the writer or small rightsholder group
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on niche catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
